exercises.title: Build a RESTful API with Express
exercises.description: Create an Express API for managing a todo list. Implement endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting todos. Include proper error handling and validation.

exercises.title: Create Custom Middleware
exercises.description: Build custom middleware functions for logging, authentication, and request validation. Apply them to specific routes.

exercises.title: Build a File Upload API
exercises.description: Create an Express endpoint that handles file uploads using multer middleware. Store uploaded files and return metadata.

summary: These exercises cover building RESTful APIs, creating custom middleware, and handling file uploads with Express. They demonstrate practical patterns used in real-world Express applications.
